description: Curated multi-step sessions for serial live execution against the local Word fixtures.

steps: Identify the heading tree and section map.
Repair or refresh the table of contents.
Normalize heading styles in the selected report chapter.
Confirm the page numbering and headers remained intact.
sticky_constraints: Do not edit the title page.
Preserve headers and footers outside the active report section.

steps: Identify the clause tree and defined terms near the target region.
Insert or revise a clause in the approved location only.
Verify numbering continuity and defined-term consistency.
sticky_constraints: Do not touch clauses outside the approved region.

steps: Inspect the sponsor headings and the approved edit region.
Rewrite the selected paragraph for clarity.
Confirm no sponsor headings or protected regions changed.
sticky_constraints: Work only in the approved region.
